main_post.text:
🔍 TimberBoostControl v0.1.0 Released

A Timberborn DLL mod that brings settings.json-driven gameplay customization.

🎯 Key Innovation:
Instead of hardcoding values, it reads numeric multipliers from a JSON config and regenerates blueprint overrides dynamically.

⚙️ Core Features:
• Bottom-bar Boost launcher with icon fallback
• Read-only control panel showing resolved settings path
• Auto-creates settings.json if missing
• Regenerates building/character blueprint overrides
• Tracks generated files for clean replacement

📊 Supported Values:
• Carry/MoveSpeed/Storage multipliers
• Build/Science/Power cost percentages
• Workplace worker multiplier

💡 Use Case:
Edit settings.json → Reload in-game → Restart → New values applied

Perfect for learning IModStarter, Configurator, ILoadableSingleton, and JSON-driven content generation.

$ONIAGI
